pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicit variable assignment
Task description and export_result.sh explicit variable assignment
Task description and export_result.sh explicit variable assignment
Task description exact text to copy, and verifier.py protocol/path checks
export_result.sh loop checking these 5 stations explicitly, and grep on ge_stations.xml confirming these stations are in the FDSN data

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses real seismic data from the GEOFON network (stations TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB) and USGS (event us6000m0xl, 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake). The task strictly verifies the global config path (/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/global.cfg), the exact required recordstream entry (sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive), and output paths for the inventory (/home/ga/inventory_listing.txt) and miniSEED waveforms (/home/ga/extracted_waveforms.mseed) via export_result.sh. The waveform export must be at least 512 bytes, and the inventory must contain at least 10 bytes and match the 5 listed station codes.
